message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classDiagram labelStyle fontname "Helvetica"

class system {
    Actor admin
    Actor book
    Actor reader
    Actor lend_list
}

interface Lend_list {
    boolean lendBook(int bookId, int readerNumber)
    boolean returnBook(int bookId, int readerNumber)
}

interface Book {
    boolean addBook(Book book)
    Book deleteBook(int bookId)
    Book selectBook(int bookId)
    boolean updateBook(Book book)
}

system -- Lend_list : contains
system -- Book : contains
system -- Reader : contains
system -- Admin : contains

system : Lend_list
system : Book
system : Reader
system : Admin

system : lendBook
system : returnBook
system : addBook
system : deleteBook
system : selectBook
system : updateBook

@enduml
